 I submitted ports/160705 with attached patch on Tue, 13th Sep. The maintain=
 er has timed out. In fact, an attempt to contact the maintainer beforehand =
 was unsuccessful as well.
 
 Could you help me how to proceed to have my patch accepted?
 
 Thank you, cheers,
 --=20
 Christopher J. Ruwe
 TZ GMT + 2
